notableMoments: Qualified for their first and only World Cup in 1998, an enormous achievement for Caribbean football
Theodore Whitmore scored both goals in a famous 2-1 victory over Japan, their only World Cup win
Known as the 'Reggae Boyz', they captured global imagination with their spirited campaign
Lost to Croatia 3-1 and Argentina 5-0 in the group stage but the Japan win was historic
The squad included several England-based players including Robbie Earle, Deon Burton, and Fitzroy Simpson
Qualification campaign united the entire nation and became a symbol of Jamaican sporting pride
